firewall_rules.evidence: ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN permit tcp any any eq 22
ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN permit tcp any any eq 23
ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN permit tcp any any eq 80
ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN permit tcp any any eq 3389
ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN deny ip any any log
ip access-list extended OUTBOUND permit ip any any

cis_results.title: No insecure management protocols exposed
evidence: ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN permit tcp any any eq 23
ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN permit tcp any any eq 80
cis_results.recommendation: Disable Telnet, FTP, HTTP management, and SNMPv1/v2c. Prefer SSH/HTTPS with strong auth.

cis_results.title: SSH is restricted to a management subnet
evidence: ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN permit tcp any any eq 22
cis_results.recommendation: Limit SSH ingress to a dedicated management subnet or VPN range.

cis_results.title: Default or weak SNMP communities are not used
cis_results.recommendation: Remove default SNMP communities and use SNMPv3 with unique credentials.

cis_results.title: Sensitive ports are not exposed to the internet
evidence: ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN permit tcp any any eq 22
ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN permit tcp any any eq 23
ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN permit tcp any any eq 3389
cis_results.recommendation: Remove 0.0.0.0/0 ingress to SSH, Telnet, RDP, SMB, and database ports.

cis_results.title: Egress traffic is filtered
evidence: ip access-list extended OUTBOUND permit ip any any
cis_results.recommendation: Use default-deny outbound and allow only required destinations and ports.

cis_results.title: Remote logging/syslog is enabled
cis_results.recommendation: Forward logs to a remote collector or SIEM.

cis_results.title: Default-deny inbound posture exists
evidence: ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN deny ip any any log
cis_results.recommendation: Add an explicit final deny rule and only permit required inbound traffic.

cis_results.title: Unencrypted HTTP management is disabled
evidence: ip access-list extended OUTSIDE_IN permit tcp any any eq 80
cis_results.recommendation: Disable HTTP management and use HTTPS or SSH from trusted management networks.
